_comment: MCP surface for a jarvis cluster RUN (claude -p inside a Job). DELIBERATELY narrower than the edge brain's _write_mcp_config(): jarvis_runner is EXCLUDED (a run must not launch more runs — no recursion), and jarvis_sonos / jarvis_persona / jarvis_delegate are excluded (the Job IS the delegate; runs don't speak or self-tune). The run gets read-only kube + overview + mem0 + personal. mem0 writes land in the JARVIS_MEM_SCOPE='runs' scope set by the Job env. These paths match the jarvis-edge image /app layout.
